mapper.select: SELECT poi.po_id FROM purchase_orders po JOIN purchase_order_items poi ON poi.po_id = po.po_id WHERE po.store_id = #{storeId} AND po.status = 'PENDING' AND poi.product_id = #{productId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO purchase_orders (store_id, total_amount, status) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status})
INSERT INTO purchase_order_items (po_id, product_id, order_qty, unit_cost_snapshot) VALUES (#{poId}, #{productId}, #{orderQty}, #{unitCostSnapshot})
mapper.select: SELECT product_id, product_name, unit, order_qty, unit_cost_snapshot FROM v_purchase_order_details WHERE po_id = #{poId} ORDER BY product_name ASC
SELECT po_id, store_id, total_amount, status, ordered_at, delivered_at, created_at FROM purchase_orders WHERE po_id = #{poId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE purchase_orders SET status = 'CANCELED' WHERE po_id = #{poId} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT po_id FROM purchase_orders WHERE status = 'PENDING'
SELECT po_item_id, po_id, product_id, order_qty, unit_cost_snapshot FROM purchase_order_items WHERE po_id = #{poId} ORDER BY po_item_id ASC

SELECT p.name AS productName, SUM(poi.order_qty) AS totalQty, p.unit AS unit FROM purchase_orders po JOIN purchase_order_items poi ON po.po_id = poi.po_id JOIN products p ON poi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE po.store_id = #{storeId} AND po.status != 'CANCELLED' AND po.created_at >= #{startDate} AND po.created_at < #{endDate} GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name, p.unit ORDER BY totalQty DESC
